'''Kirith''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. At some point, he was intimidated by agents of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
